prompt: Create a surreal lifestyle fashion advertisement poster for crocs. Vertical composition, photorealistic, golden-hour outdoor lighting. A young woman sits relaxed on a grassy lakeside meadow filled with small white daisies, leaning against an enormous oversized foam clog in a pale sage green color. The giant shoe should dominate the scene like a playful sculpture, positioned behind her at a slight angle with the heel strap raised upright and visible round logo rivet on the side. Show realistic Crocs-style details: ventilation holes on top, textured molded foam surface, thick sole, front ports, and side perforations. The model wears matching light green clogs, white scrunched crew socks, a muted sage green cropped tank top, high-waisted cream patterned shorts, an open loose white shirt draped off her shoulders, and a simple necklace. She has dark hair in a messy bun and reclines with one knee bent, gazing upward in a carefree pose. Background: calm lake, distant green hills or low mountains, and a bright blue sky with large soft cumulus clouds. Use a clean editorial ad aesthetic with cheerful, airy summer vibes, shallow depth of field but enough clarity to keep both the model and giant clog sharp. Add centered white brand text at the top: large rounded lowercase logo reading crocs with a small trademark symbol, and beneath it a white slogan line reading Come as you are. Comfort follows.. Emphasize harmony between the model's outfit and the shoe color palette, aspirational comfort, whimsical scale contrast, and polished commercial photography.
